ogTitle: Picton vs Piesse Brook: Climate Safety

heading: Picton vs Piesse Brook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Picton, Western Australia and Piesse Brook, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Picton has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Piesse Brook (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Picton or Piesse Brook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Picton has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Piesse Brook scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Picton scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Piesse Brook scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Picton or Piesse Brook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Picton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
